name: Healthcare Staffing

credentialCompliance.description: Active licenses, certifications, and credentials for the role and state

clinicalSkills.description: Clinical competencies matching the position requirements

experienceDepth.description: Years in specialty, facility types, and patient populations

locationFit.description: NLC compact state eligibility or willingness to obtain state license

availability.description: Ready to start within required timeframe, shift flexibility

notes: Credential compliance is weighted highest because a candidate without proper credentials cannot be placed regardless of other qualifications.
